hero.page_label: 🚀 From Idea to MVP in Weeks
hero.title:
Stop building decks.
Start shipping product.
hero.subtitle: We build MVPs, mobile apps, and cloud platforms for early-stage startups — fixed price, no equity, delivered in 4-8 weeks. Direct access to senior engineers who actually build your product.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.desc: We build cross-platform applications using Flutter and React Native. This lets you ship to both iOS and Android simultaneously from a single codebase without sacrificing native performance, allowing you to reach users on all platforms from day one.

items.title: Web Applications
items.desc: High-performance web platforms and SaaS products engineered with Next.js and React. Our web apps are SEO-friendly, blazing fast, and designed with infinite scalability in mind to handle rapid user growth without breaking.

items.title: AI Chatbots & Automation
items.desc: Turn AI into an actual product feature. We integrate cutting-edge LLMs, build interactive WhatsApp bots, and automate complex workflows to give your startup an unfair technological advantage over traditional competitors.

items.title: Cloud Infrastructure
items.desc: Serverless architecture deployed on Firebase, Supabase, or Cloudflare Workers. We keep your initial cloud bill close to zero while you search for product-market fit, ensuring you only pay for what you use as you scale.

industries.title: FinTech & SaaS
industries.desc: Scalable web applications, subscription billing integrations, and secure data handling designed to comply with financial standards.

industries.title: D2C & E-Commerce
industries.desc: High-conversion storefronts, inventory management systems, and automated fulfillment workflows tailored for direct-to-consumer brands.

industries.title: HealthTech & EdTech
industries.desc: HIPAA-compliant infrastructure, real-time video streaming, and user-centric interfaces for modern healthcare and education platforms.

cta.title: Ready to ship your MVP?
cta.description: Book a free scoping call. We will review your idea and give you a fixed quote within 48 hours.
